items.summary: Redesign the VTH logo/wordmark in the sticky header (AppLayout.tsx) to be significantly larger and more visually prominent. The 'VTH' text or mark should have increased font size, weight, and/or letter spacing so it stands out clearly at a glance.

Update the color scheme of the VTH logo/wordmark to use colors that are aesthetically pleasing and harmonize with the site's existing warm earthy OKLCH design tokens (defined in frontend/src/index.css and frontend/tailwind.config.js). The new logo colors should feel cohesive with the overall palette rather than contrasting against it.
